final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-video vertical cover for the GGU 8K 1000Hz esports monitor product launch, designed for Reels/Stories sharing with bold headline typography and a minimal premium aesthetic.

Style/medium: minimal premium product cover with the cool restraint of high-end tech editorial, every element earning its place on the canvas
Composition: rule-of-thirds grid — monitor occupies the lower-right third, headline anchored upper-left, negative space doing the heavy lifting
Subject: GGU esports gaming monitor, sleek and angular, facing slightly toward camera, screen glowing with crisp color
Scene/backdrop: deep near-black background with a subtle cool-blue gradient breath behind the monitor
Lighting/mood: the cold precision of a product launch stage — a single hard rim light tracing the monitor's edge, tension between darkness and the screen's inner glow
Color palette: near-black ground in quiet conversation with electric blue accent and a sliver of pure white for the headline — cool graphite temperature with one charged moment of color
Materials/textures: brushed metal chassis catching the rim light, matte dark surround absorbing everything else
Text (verbatim): 8K GGU 电竞显示器 1000Hz（大字主标题）/ 全球首发 全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩（副标题）
Constraints: 9:16 vertical format, headline must be large and eye-catching, rule-of-thirds composition strictly observed, all text legible against background
Avoid: busy backgrounds, warm tones, decorative gradients unrelated to tech aesthetic, cluttered layout, stuffer glow effects
